title: Thorm's Bosses
description: A mod of a new mob group of mobs called Thorms, there are Thorms, slimes, snakes and 8 different bosses. there are a lot of weapons and magic items.
body:
A mod of Thorms, Snakes, Slimes, and lots of powerfull bosses.

This mod adds 8 unique bosses with exclusive rewards, lots of new friendly and hostile mobs, and new weapons.

Bosses:
<details>
<summary>Minigunner Thorm</summary>

**Minigunner Thorm:** The first boss of the mod. He has a machine gun that can fire four bullets per second and every few seconds he can launch a bomb; it's not recommended to face him without any ranged weapon.
![Minigunner Thorm](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ec6ebf00fea55282faa2daf28ece3591a2485ca_0.webp)

</details>

<details>
<summary>XXL Thorm</summary>

**XXL Thorm:** Probably the easiest boss to defeat, it can explode and attack, and it can also summon minions.
![XXL Thorm](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78ce05e5ebef43ef5dd16d98b7f1fbfd9bc7aa8a_0.webp)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Evoker Thorm</summary>

**Evoker Thorm:** It can summon allies, evoker fangs, fire magic orbs, and regenerate. But it is very weak in melee combat.
![Evoker Thorm](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/443cef52ff99445576460134df7cb3c427cafad0_0.webp)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Sculptor Thorm</summary>

**Sculptor Thorm:** Probably the best boss in this mod, and also the dev's favorite. He can lift rocks and shoot them, attack with a cursed bamboo, summon allies, heal himself, summon bamboo from the ground, and has a second phase.
![Sculptor Thorm](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3f25c915bd82f87cc35075cc861ecfb75d99791_0.webp)
